exchanges.prompt: generate an hld of two web app and a loadbalancer

response.content:
graph TD
    LB[Load Balancer] -->|requests| WA1[Web App 1]
    LB -->|requests| WA2[Web App 2]
    WA1 -.->|database queries|->> DB[Database]
    WA2 -.->|database queries|->> DB
    DB -.->|data|->> WA1
    DB -.->|data|->> WA2
    User[User] -->|http requests| LB
